[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A screenshot of a dark-themed comment and premium subscription interface with a loading spinner in the center.

Main Subject: The primary focus is the on-screen user interface showing comment controls, a text input bar, and premium-related panels, with a small circular loading spinner in the middle of the screen.

Setting: The scene is a mobile app or social media interface displayed in portrait orientation, with a dark background and UI elements layered vertically.

Visual Details: The background is mostly black or very dark gray. Near the top center there is a white circular loading spinner. Below it, a row of rectangular buttons appears: one labeled “Top Comment,” another labeled “Terbaru,” and a third option on the right labeled “Atur” with a small icon. In the middle area there is a rounded rectangular input field with placeholder text “Tambahkan komentar...,” and a small send/arrow icon next to it, along with a yellow circular button featuring a crown-like symbol. Several comments are shown in stacked rows with circular profile icons on the left, usernames and small badges next to them, and text lines beneath; one visible comment includes “Lagi ngk sih” followed by four flame emojis. A large green panel appears with a crown icon on the left and text indicating “30 Hari Premium” and “Tersisa 17 dari 50,” and on the right it says “Diklaim.” Further down there is a blue panel with “1 Hari Premium” and text “Tersisa 22 dari 22,” with a rounded white button on the right labeled “Klaim.” At the bottom, another section includes a “Reply” label and another comment entry with a circular profile icon and green/colored badge elements.

Practical Summary: The image shows a dark-mode mobile interface with sorting buttons, a comment input area, and multiple user comments. It also displays premium subscription status panels with claim buttons and countdown-like remaining text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
